user.title: Region
user.description: Select the AWS region your Lymow account is registered with.

auth_method.title: Sign-in method
auth_method.description: How did you create your Lymow account?

srp.title: Email and password
srp.description: Sign in with the email and password you use in the Lymow app.

oauth.title: Federated sign-in (Google or Apple)
oauth.description:
**1.** [Click here to sign in]({oauth_url}). After signing in, your browser will fail to redirect to `myapp://callback/...` — that's expected.

**2.** Copy the URL from your browser's address bar (it should start with `myapp://callback/?code=...`) and paste it below.

**3.** If your address bar is blank after the redirect, open browser DevTools (F12) → Network tab → find the row for `callback` → right-click → Copy URL.

pick_device.title: Choose a mower
pick_device.description: Select which Lymow mower to add to Home Assistant.

error.auth_failed: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password and try again.
error.oauth_failed: Code exchange failed. The code may have expired — try the sign-in flow again.
error.no_code_found: Could not extract an auth code from the input. Make sure you pasted the full callback URL.

abort.device_list_failed: Could not retrieve device list — sign-in succeeded but the device-list API failed.
abort.no_devices: No mowers found on this account.
abort.already_configured: This mower is already added to Home Assistant.
